allow: Bash(sw_vers && sysctl -n machdep.cpu.brand_string && system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(which swift && swift --version 2>/dev/null; which swiftc && swiftc --version 2>/dev/null; xcodebuild -version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(which zig 2>/dev/null; zig version 2>/dev/null; which rustc 2>/dev/null; rustc --version 2>/dev/null; which cargo 2>/dev/null; cargo --version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(pkg-config --list-all 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E "vterm|whisper|metal" || echo "No relevant pkg-config packages found")
Bash(which rustc && rustc --version && which cargo && cargo --version 2>/dev/null; which swift && swift --version 2>/dev/null | head -3; which just 2>/dev/null; which cbindgen 2>/dev/null)
Bash(python3 -c "import cairosvg; print\('cairosvg available'\)" 2>&1 || echo "cairosvg not available")
Bash(brew list librsvg 2>&1 | head -5; echo "---"; brew list cairo 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(python3 -c "import PIL; print\('Pillow available, version:', PIL.__version__\)" 2>&1 || echo "Pillow not available")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add app icon with Tifinagh lettermark

Add the ⴰⵡⴰⵍ Tifinagh icon as the app icon, replacing the default
macOS executable icon. Includes a generation script that uses sips and
iconutil to produce the .icns from a 1024x1024 source PNG.
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add app/Sources/App/Resources/AppIcon-source.png app/Sources/App/Resources/AppIcon.icns scripts/generate-icon.sh && git commit --amend --no-edit)

Bash(fc-list 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E "nerd|powerline|\\bNF\\b" | head -20 || python3 -c "
from AppKit import NSFontManager
fm = NSFontManager.sharedFontManager\(\)
for name in fm.availableFonts\(\):
    n = str\(name\)
    if 'Nerd' in n or 'NF' in n or 'Powerline' in n:
        print\(n\)
" 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open\('/var/folders/3m/kfs4t2zn0731yn7xnwtm6xjr0000gn/T/TemporaryItems/NSIRD_screencaptureui_aitq3O/Screenshot 2026-03-05 at 3.53.32 PM.png'\)
# Sample center pixel
w, h = img.size
r, g, b = img.getpixel\(\(w//2, h//2\)\)[:3]
print\(f'RGB: \({r}, {g}, {b}\)'\)
print\(f'Hex: #{r:02x}{g:02x}{b:02x}'\)
print\(f'Float: \({r}/255.0, {g}/255.0, {b}/255.0\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import subprocess, json
result = subprocess.run\(['sips', '-g', 'all', '/var/folders/3m/kfs4t2zn0731yn7xnwtm6xjr0000gn/T/TemporaryItems/NSIRD_screencaptureui_aitq3O/Screenshot 2026-03-05 at 3.53.32 PM.png'], capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\(result.stdout[:500]\)
" && python3 -c "
import AppKit
img = AppKit.NSImage.alloc\(\).initWithContentsOfFile_\('/var/folders/3m/kfs4t2zn0731yn7xnwtm6xjr0000gn/T/TemporaryItems/NSIRD_screencaptureui_aitq3O/Screenshot 2026-03-05 at 3.53.32 PM.png'\)
rep = img.representations\(\)[0]
w, h = int\(rep.pixelsWide\(\)\), int\(rep.pixelsHigh\(\)\)
bmp = AppKit.NSBitmapImageRep.alloc\(\).initWithData_\(img.TIFFRepresentation\(\)\)
color = bmp.colorAtX_y_\(w//2, h//2\)
r, g, b = color.redComponent\(\), color.greenComponent\(\), color.blueComponent\(\)
print\(f'RGB: \({int\(r*255\)}, {int\(g*255\)}, {int\(b*255\)}\)'\)
print\(f'Hex: #{int\(r*255\):02x}{int\(g*255\):02x}{int\(b*255\):02x}'\)
")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace native macOS tabs with custom fixed-width left-aligned tab bar

Native NSWindow tabs stretch to fill the full window width, which looks
bloated with 1-2 tabs. This replaces them with a custom CustomTabBarView
that renders left-aligned tabs with a max-width of 180px.

- Add TabState to hold per-tab split container, status bar, and title
- Add CustomTabBarView with close-on-hover, accent underline, + button
- Refactor TerminalWindowController to manage tabs via content swapping
  in a single window instead of native tab groups
- Add right-click context menu on tabs \(Rename, Close, Close Others\)
- Add Cmd+Shift+]/[ shortcuts for next/prev tab navigation
- Pause StatusBarView polling timer for background tabs to save CPU
- Remove native tab menu injection from AppDelegate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add configurable themes, scrollback search, hyperlinks, and tab reorder

- TOML-based AppConfig for font, theme colors, and keybindings
- Scrollback search \(Cmd+F\) with match navigation
- OSC 8 hyperlink support \(Cmd+click to open URLs\)
- Tab drag-to-reorder in custom tab bar
- Fix color space crash \(grayscale NSColor → sRGB conversion\)
- Fix vtable crash \(CustomTabBarView → final class\)
- Remove PUA character from git branch display
- Update plan.md with completed phases and current status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add inline diff viewer, smart copy, and generating state

Diff viewer: colored backgrounds for diff regions — green for
additions, red for deletions, purple for hunk headers, dim for
diff --git lines.

Smart copy: strip ``` fence lines when Cmd+C selection falls
entirely within a code block region.

Generating state: track isGenerating/generationPhase in
TerminalView, fire onGeneratingChanged callback on PTY output
and idle timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
